mapper.select: SELECT * FROM login WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM login WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM login WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login (phone, password, status) VALUES (#{phone}, #{password}, #{status})
INSERT INTO login (email, password, status) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE login SET password = #{password} WHERE phone = #{phone}
UPDATE login SET password = #{password} WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE login SET phone = #{phone} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE login SET email = #{email} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT l.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.avatar AS avatar, u.signature AS signature, l.phone AS phone, l.email AS email, l.status AS status FROM login l LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = l.user_id ORDER BY l.user_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE login SET status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
